Broken Duck Studio

About Membership Resources Login

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Broken Duck Studio?
Broken Duck Studio is a creator-focused production space for YouTubers based in Chiang Mai. We offer memberships, workshops, equipment rentals, and production support to help creators grow their channels.
Where is the studio located?
We're located in Mae Pu Kha, San Kamphaeng District — about 25 minutes from central Chiang Mai. Members receive exact directions after signup.
Who can become a member?
Membership is open to anyone actively working on a YouTube channel. You don’t need to be monetized yet, but you must be serious about creating content for YouTube.
Can I use the studio for content that’s not on YouTube?
Yes — but you must be actively running a YouTube channel to be eligible for membership. You're free to record anything you like, as long as you're using YouTube as a primary platform.
Is there an application process?
Right now, there’s no application — but we will require one in the future. When applications open, creators will need to share their channel and content goals.
What’s included in a membership?
All members get 24/7 access to studio spaces, high-speed internet, a sound booth, lockers, private booking, weekly workshops, monthly events, and 4 guest passes per month.
How do I book a room or booth?
All members can book rooms and gear through our internal booking system, which will be available through the member login portal.
What are the Sunday workshops?
Workshops happen every Sunday from 1–4 PM. Topics range from editing and scripting to monetization and thumbnail design. They include breakout sessions, peer feedback, and hands-on help. The last Sunday of each month is a public event. See event details.
Can I bring guests?
Yes. All members receive 4 guest passes per month. Guests must be registered in advance and are only allowed during staffed hours or events.
Do you offer equipment rentals?
Yes. We rent cameras, microphones, lighting kits, and teleprompters through our partner Green Light Studio. View rental list.
Do you offer full production packages?
Yes. You can book a full day or half day session with a videographer, director, and creative support. These are perfect for high-quality content shoots. See package options.
What’s the difference between monetized and non-monetized membership?
All members get the same access. Monetized members receive a lower rate and can serve as mentors to newer creators. Non-monetized members are matched with a mentor from within the studio.
Do you offer support for growing channels?
Yes. Our mentorship model pairs monetized members with newer creators. Weekly workshops also focus on skill-building, strategy, and collaboration.
Will there be a member login area?
Yes. A members-only area is coming soon with booking tools, premium resources, and creator discussion spaces. Coming soon.
Will you launch an MCN or partner program?
Yes. We're working on a future MCN offering for monetized creators. It will include optional support with monetization, channel growth, and production. Learn more.
How do I get started?
Go to the Membership page, choose your plan, and confirm payment. You'll receive welcome info and access instructions right after.
